name: Abacus
notes: SRD adventuring gear. Counting frame used for ledgers, trade, and puzzle props.

name: Alchemy Jug
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon wondrous item. Produces a chosen liquid each day from a fixed list.

name: Amulet (worn or held)
notes: SRD holy symbol. Used as a spellcasting focus when your class permits it.

name: Amulet of Health
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wondrous item, requires attunement. Sets Constitution to 19 unless it is already higher.

name: Amulet of Proof against Detection and Location
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon wondrous item, requires attunement. Protects the wearer from divination location magic.

name: Apparatus of the Crab
notes: SRD magic item. Legendary wondrous item. Large magical vehicle shaped like a crab with levers for movement and attacks.

name: Arrows (20)
notes: SRD ammunition. Amount: 20. Typical storage: Quiver.

name: Backpack
notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Backpack holds up to 30 pounds within 1 cubic foot. It can also serve as a saddlebag.

name: Bag of Beans
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wondrous item. Contains magic beans that create unpredictable effects when planted and watered.

name: Bag of Devouring
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare wondrous item. Resembles a Bag of Holding but can destroy stored creatures or objects.

name: Bag of Holding
notes: Wondrous item. Stores far more than its outside dimensions suggest while keeping a fixed carried weight.

name: Bag of Tricks (Gray)
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon wondrous item. Pulling a fuzzy object from the bag can create a temporary animal ally.

name: Bag of Tricks (Rust)
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon wondrous item. Pulling a fuzzy object from the bag can create a temporary animal ally.

name: Bag of Tricks (Tan)
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon wondrous item. Pulling a fuzzy object from the bag can create a temporary animal ally.

name: Ball Bearings
notes: SRD adventuring gear. As a Utilize action, you can spill Ball Bearings from their pouch. They spread to cover a level, 10-foot-square area within 10 feet of yourself.

name: Barrel
notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Barrel holds up to 40 gallons of liquid or up to 4 cubic feet of dry goods.

name: Basket
notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Basket holds up to 40 pounds within 2 cubic feet.

name: Bedroll
notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Bedroll sleeps one Small or Medium creature. While in a Bedroll, you automatically succeed on saving throws against extreme cold (see "Gameplay Toolbox").

name: Bell
notes: SRD adventuring gear. When rung as a Utilize action, a Bell produces a sound that can be heard up to 60 feet away.

name: Belt of Dwarvenkind
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wondrous item, requires attunement. Improves Constitution, dwarven resilience, and social bearing with dwarves.

name: Belt of Giant Strength (Cloud)
notes: SRD magic item. Legendary wondrous item, requires attunement. Sets Strength to 27 unless it is already higher.

name: Belt of Giant Strength (Fire)
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare wondrous item, requires attunement. Sets Strength to 25 unless it is already higher.

name: Belt of Giant Strength (Hill)
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wondrous item, requires attunement. Sets Strength to 21 unless it is already higher.

name: Belt of Giant Strength (Stone or Frost)
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare wondrous item, requires attunement. Sets Strength to 23 unless it is already higher.

name: Belt of Giant Strength (Storm)
notes: SRD magic item. Legendary wondrous item, requires attunement. Sets Strength to 29 unless it is already higher.

name: Blanket
notes: SRD adventuring gear. While wrapped in a blanket, you have Advantage on saving throws against extreme cold (see "Gameplay Toolbox").

name: Block and Tackle
notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Block and Tackle allows you to hoist up to four times the weight you can normally lift.

name: Bolts (20)
notes: SRD ammunition. Amount: 20. Typical storage: Case.

name: Book
notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Book contains fiction or nonfiction. If you consult an accurate nonfiction Book about its topic, you gain a +5 bonus to Intelligence (Arcana, History, Nature, or Religion) checks you make about that topic.

name: Book of Exalted Deeds
notes: SRD magic item. Artifact wondrous item, requires attunement by a good creature. Sacred text that grants powerful benefits and demands virtue.

name: Book of Vile Darkness
notes: SRD magic item. Artifact wondrous item, requires attunement. Corrupt tome containing evil lore and dangerous powers.

name: Boots of Elvenkind
notes: SRD Uncommon wondrous item. Silences the wearer steps and improves stealthy movement.

name: Boots of Levitation
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wondrous item, requires attunement. Lets the wearer cast Levitate on themself.

name: Boots of Speed
notes: SRD Rare wondrous item, requires attunement. Doubles walking speed for limited daily duration and imposes disadvantage on opportunity attacks.

name: Boots of Striding and Springing
notes: SRD Uncommon wondrous item, requires attunement. Improves walking speed floor and jump distance.

name: Boots of the Winterlands
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon wondrous item, requires attunement. Protects against cold and difficult icy terrain.

name: Bottle, Glass
notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Glass Bottle holds up to 1½ pints.

name: Bowl of Commanding Water Elementals
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wondrous item. Summons and helps command a water elemental when used near enough water.

name: Bracers of Archery
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon wondrous item, requires attunement. Grants bow proficiency and a damage bonus with longbows and shortbows.

name: Bracers of Defense
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wondrous item, requires attunement. Grants +2 AC while not wearing armor or using a shield.

name: Brazier of Commanding Fire Elementals
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wondrous item. Summons and helps command a fire elemental when lit with fuel.

name: Brooch of Shielding
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon wondrous item, requires attunement. Grants resistance to force damage and immunity to Magic Missile damage.

name: Broom of Flying
notes: SRD Uncommon wondrous item. Carries a rider through the air and can be commanded to travel alone.

name: Bucket
notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Bucket holds up to half a cubic foot of contents.

name: Bullets, Firearm (10)
notes: SRD ammunition. Amount: 10. Typical storage: Pouch.

name: Bullets, Sling (20)
notes: SRD ammunition. Amount: 20. Typical storage: Pouch.

name: Burglar's Pack
notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Burglar's Pack contains the following items: Backpack, Ball Bearings, Bell, 10 Candles, Crowbar, Hooded Lantern, 7 flasks of Oil, 5 days of Rations, Rope, Tinderbox, and Waterskin.

name: Caltrops
notes: SRD adventuring gear. As a Utilize action, you can spread Caltrops from their bag to cover a 5-foot-square area within 5 feet of yourself. A creature that enters this area for the first time on a turn must succeed on a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or take 1 Piercing damage and have its Speed reduced to 0 until the start of its next turn.

name: Cape of the Mountebank
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wondrous item. Lets the wearer use Dimension Door with a smoky flourish once per dawn.

name: Carpet of Flying
notes: SRD Very rare wondrous item. Flying carpet transport; size determines carrying capacity and speed.

name: Case, Crossbow Bolt
notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Crossbow Bolt Case holds up to 20 Bolts.

name: Case, Map or Scroll
notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Map or Scroll Case holds up to 10 sheets of paper or 5 sheets of parchment.

name: Censer of Controlling Air Elementals
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wondrous item. Summons and helps command an air elemental while incense burns.

name: Chain
notes: SRD adventuring gear. As a Utilize action, you can wrap a Chain around an unwilling creature within 5 feet of yourself that has the Grappled, Incapacitated, or Restrained condition if you succeed on a DC 13 Strength (Athletics) check. If the creature's legs are bound, the creature has the Restrained condition until it escapes.

name: Chalk (1 piece)
notes: SRD adventuring gear. Marks stone, doors, dungeon routes, or temporary tactical notes.

name: Chest
notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Chest holds up to 12 cubic feet of contents.

name: Chime of Opening
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wondrous item. Opens locks, lids, portals, and similar closures until its uses are spent.

name: Circlet of Blasting
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon wondrous item. Lets the wearer cast Scorching Ray once per dawn.

name: Climber's Kit
notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Climber's Kit includes boot tips, gloves, pitons, and a harness. As a Utilize action, you can use the Climber's Kit to anchor yourself; when you do, you can't fall more than 25 feet from the anchor point, and you can't move more than 25 feet from there without undoing the anchor as a Bonus Action.

name: Cloak of Elvenkind
notes: SRD Uncommon wondrous item, requires attunement. Improves hiding and makes the wearer harder to see.

name: Cloak of Invisibility
notes: SRD Legendary wondrous item, requires attunement. Lets the wearer become invisible for limited daily duration.

name: Cloak of Protection
notes: SRD Uncommon wondrous item, requires attunement. Grants +1 bonus to Armor Class and saving throws.

name: Clothes, Fine
notes: SRD adventuring gear. Fine Clothes are made of expensive fabrics and adorned with expertly crafted details. Some events and locations admit only people wearing these clothes.

name: Clothes, Traveler's
notes: SRD adventuring gear. Traveler's Clothes are resilient garments designed for travel in various environments.

name: Component Pouch
notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Component Pouch is watertight and filled with compartments that hold all the free Material components of your spells.

name: Costume
notes: SRD adventuring gear. While wearing a Costume, you have Advantage on any ability check you make to impersonate the person or type of person it represents.

name: Crowbar
notes: SRD adventuring gear. Using a Crowbar gives you Advantage on Strength checks where the Crowbar's leverage can be applied.

name: Crystal
notes: SRD arcane focus. Used as a spellcasting focus when your class permits it.

name: Crystal Ball
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare wondrous item, requires attunement. Lets the user cast Scrying and may have special variants.

name: Cube of Force
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wondrous item, requires attunement. Creates force barriers with different settings and charge costs.

name: Cubic Gate
notes: SRD magic item. Legendary wondrous item. Six-sided cube keyed to planes and able to open gates.

name: Daern's Instant Fortress
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wondrous item. Cube expands into a durable tower and can damage creatures nearby as it appears.

name: Decanter of Endless Water
notes: SRD Uncommon wondrous item. Produces controlled amounts of water, including a forceful geyser command.

name: Dimensional Shackles
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wondrous item. Manacles that prevent bound creatures from extradimensional travel.

name: Diplomat's Pack
notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Diplomat's Pack contains the following items: Chest, Fine Clothes, Ink, 5 Ink Pens, Lamp, 2 Map or Scroll Cases, 4 flasks of Oil, 5 sheets of Paper, 5 sheets of Parchment, Perfume, and Tinderbox.

name: Driftglobe
notes: SRD Uncommon wondrous item. Floating light source that can shed magical light and follow its user.

name: Dungeoneer's Pack
notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Dungeoneer's Pack contains the following items: Backpack, Caltrops, Crowbar, 2 flasks of Oil, 10 days of Rations, Rope, Tinderbox, 10 Torches, and Waterskin.

name: Efreeti Bottle
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare wondrous item. Opening the bottle can release an efreeti with unpredictable response.

name: Emblem (borne on fabric or a Shield)
notes: SRD holy symbol. Used as a spellcasting focus when your class permits it.

name: Entertainer's Pack
notes: SRD adventuring gear. An Entertainer's Pack contains the following items: Backpack, Bedroll, Bell, Bullseye Lantern, 3 Costumes, Mirror, 8 flasks of Oil, 9 days of Rations, Tinderbox, and Waterskin.

name: Explorer's Pack
notes: SRD adventuring gear. An Explorer's Pack contains the following items: Backpack, Bedroll, 2 flasks of Oil, 10 days of Rations, Rope, Tinderbox, 10 Torches, and Waterskin.

name: Eyes of Charming
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon wondrous item, requires attunement. Holds charges to cast Charm Person.

name: Eyes of Minute Seeing
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon wondrous item. Grants advantage on Investigation checks involving close detail.

name: Eyes of the Eagle
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon wondrous item, requires attunement. Grants advantage on sight-based Perception checks at distance.

name: Feed per day
notes: SRD tack, harness, or drawn vehicle.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Bronze Griffon)
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wondrous item. Becomes a griffon for a limited duration when commanded.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Ebony Fly)
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wondrous item. Becomes a giant fly mount for a limited duration.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Golden Lions)
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wondrous item. Becomes one or two lions for a limited duration.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Ivory Goats)
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wondrous item. Becomes one of several goat forms depending on command.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Marble Elephant)
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wondrous item. Becomes an elephant for a limited duration.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Obsidian Steed)
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare wondrous item. Becomes a nightmare-like steed for a limited duration.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Onyx Dog)
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wondrous item. Becomes a loyal mastiff for a limited duration.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Serpentine Owl)
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wondrous item. Becomes a giant owl for a limited duration.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Silver Raven)
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon wondrous item. Becomes a raven and can carry messages.

name: Fishing Tackle
notes: SRD adventuring gear. Rod, line, hooks, sinkers, lures, and netting for catching fish during travel.

name: Folding Boat
notes: SRD Rare wondrous item. Command word unfolds the box into boat forms for travel.

name: Gauntlets of Ogre Power
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon wondrous item, requires attunement. Sets Strength to 19 unless it is already higher.

name: Gem of Brightness
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon wondrous item. Holds charges for bright light, blinding beams, and cone flashes.

name: Gem of Seeing
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wondrous item, requires attunement. Holds charges that grant Truesight for a short duration.

name: Gloves of Missile Snaring
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon wondrous item, requires attunement. Lets the wearer reduce or catch ranged weapon damage.

name: Gloves of Thievery
notes: SRD Uncommon wondrous item. Grants a bonus to Dexterity checks made to pick locks or disarm traps.

name: Goggles of Night
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon wondrous item. Grants Darkvision or extends existing Darkvision.

name: Grappling Hook
notes: SRD adventuring gear. As a Utilize action, you can throw the Grappling Hook at a railing, a ledge, or another catch within 50 feet of yourself, and the hook catches on if you succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity (Acrobatics) check. If you tied a Rope to the hook, you can then climb it.

name: Hammer
notes: SRD adventuring gear. Useful for pitons, nails, stakes, and improvised camp repairs.

name: Handy Haversack
notes: SRD Rare wondrous item. Extradimensional backpack with separate compartments and fixed carried weight.

name: Hat of Many Spells
notes: SRD Rare wondrous item, requires attunement. Provides flexible spellcasting options through the hat.

name: Headband of Intellect
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon wondrous item, requires attunement. Sets Intelligence to 19 unless it is already higher.

name: Healer's Kit
notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Healer's Kit has ten uses. As a Utilize action, you can expend one of its uses to stabilize an Unconscious creature that has 0 Hit Points without needing to make a Wisdom (Medicine) check.

name: Helm of Brilliance
notes: SRD Very rare wondrous item, requires attunement. Gemmed helm with fire, light, and defensive properties.

name: Helm of Comprehending Languages
notes: SRD Uncommon wondrous item. Lets the wearer cast Comprehend Languages.

name: Helm of Telepathy
notes: SRD Uncommon wondrous item, requires attunement. Enables Detect Thoughts and telepathic communication effects.

name: Helm of Teleportation
notes: SRD Rare wondrous item, requires attunement. Holds charges for Teleportation magic.

name: Horseshoes of a Zephyr
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare wondrous item. Let a horse or similar creature move above surfaces without touching them.

name: Horseshoes of Speed
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wondrous item. Increase a horse or similar creature walking speed.

name: Hourglass
notes: SRD adventuring gear. Measures one hour for watches, rituals, and timed hazards.

name: Hunting Trap
notes: SRD adventuring gear. As a Utilize action, you can set a Hunting Trap, which is a sawtooth steel ring that snaps shut when a creature steps on a pressure plate in the center. The trap is affixed by a heavy chain to an immobile object, such as a tree or a spike driven into the ground.

name: Immovable Rod
notes: SRD Uncommon rod. Button fixes the rod in place until released or overloaded.

name: Ink
notes: SRD adventuring gear. Ink comes in a 1-ounce bottle, which provides enough ink to write about 500 pages.

name: Ink Pen
notes: SRD adventuring gear. Using Ink, an Ink Pen is used to write or draw.

name: Instant Fortress
notes: SRD Rare wondrous item. Cube expands into a durable tower and can damage nearby creatures as it appears.

name: Ioun Stone (Absorption)
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare wondrous item, requires attunement. Absorbs spells of limited levels while orbiting the user.

name: Ioun Stone (Agility)
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare wondrous item, requires attunement. Increases Dexterity by 2 to a maximum of 20.

name: Ioun Stone (Awareness)
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wondrous item, requires attunement. Prevents the user from being surprised while conscious.

name: Ioun Stone (Fortitude)
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare wondrous item, requires attunement. Increases Constitution by 2 to a maximum of 20.

name: Ioun Stone (Insight)
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare wondrous item, requires attunement. Increases Wisdom by 2 to a maximum of 20.

name: Ioun Stone (Intellect)
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare wondrous item, requires attunement. Increases Intelligence by 2 to a maximum of 20.

name: Ioun Stone (Leadership)
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare wondrous item, requires attunement. Increases Charisma by 2 to a maximum of 20.

name: Ioun Stone (Mastery)
notes: SRD magic item. Legendary wondrous item, requires attunement. Increases proficiency bonus by 1.

name: Ioun Stone (Protection)
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wondrous item, requires attunement. Grants +1 bonus to Armor Class.

name: Ioun Stone (Regeneration)
notes: SRD magic item. Legendary wondrous item, requires attunement. Restores hit points over time while the user is above 0 HP.

name: Ioun Stone (Reserve)
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wondrous item, requires attunement. Stores spells for later casting.

name: Ioun Stone (Strength)
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare wondrous item, requires attunement. Increases Strength by 2 to a maximum of 20.

name: Ioun Stone (Sustenance)
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wondrous item, requires attunement. Sustains the user without eating or drinking.

name: Iron Bands of Binding
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wondrous item. Thrown bands expand to restrain a creature.

name: Iron Flask
notes: SRD magic item. Legendary wondrous item. Can trap a creature from another plane and later release it.

name: Jug
notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Jug holds up to 1 gallon.

name: Ladder
notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Ladder is 10 feet tall. You must climb to move up or down it.

name: Lamp
notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Lamp burns Oil as fuel to cast Bright Light in a 15-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 30 feet.

name: Lantern of Revealing
notes: SRD Uncommon wondrous item. Sheds light that reveals invisible creatures and objects.

name: Lantern, Bullseye
notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Bullseye Lantern burns Oil as fuel to cast Bright Light in a 60-foot Cone and Dim Light for an additional 60 feet.

name: Lantern, Hooded
notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Hooded Lantern burns Oil as fuel to cast Bright Light in a 30-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 30 feet. As a Bonus Action, you can lower the hood, reducing the light to Dim Light in a 5-foot radius, or raise it again.

name: Lens of Detection
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon wondrous item. Helps locate secret doors and traps when used to inspect an area.

name: Loadstone
notes: SRD magic item. Cursed wondrous item. Appears as a useful stone but burdens the carrier until the curse is removed.

name: Lock
notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Lock comes with a key. Without the key, a creature can use Thieves' Tools to pick this Lock with a successful DC 15 Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check.

name: Magnifying Glass
notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Magnifying Glass grants Advantage on any ability check made to appraise or inspect a highly detailed item. Lighting a fire with a Magnifying Glass requires light as bright as sunlight to focus, tinder to ignite, and about 5 minutes for the fire to ignite.

name: Manacles
notes: SRD adventuring gear. As a Utilize action, you can use Manacles to bind an unwilling Small or Medium creature within 5 feet of yourself that has the Grappled, Incapacitated, or Restrained condition if you succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check. While bound, a creature has Disadvantage on attack rolls, and the creature is Restrained if the Manacles are attached to a chain or hook that is fixed in place.

name: Mantle of Spell Resistance
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wondrous item, requires attunement. Grants advantage on saving throws against spells.

name: Manual of Bodily Health
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare wondrous item. Reading and practicing for 48 hours increases Constitution by 2 and its maximum by 2.

name: Manual of Gainful Exercise
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare wondrous item. Reading and practicing for 48 hours increases Strength by 2 and its maximum by 2.

name: Manual of Golems
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare wondrous item. Contains instructions and magic for creating a specific golem.

name: Manual of Quickness of Action
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare wondrous item. Reading and practicing for 48 hours increases Dexterity by 2 and its maximum by 2.

name: Map
notes: SRD adventuring gear. If you consult an accurate Map, you gain a +5 bonus to Wisdom (Survival) checks you make to find your way in the place represented on it.

name: Medallion of Thoughts
notes: SRD Uncommon wondrous item, requires attunement. Holds charges to cast Detect Thoughts.

name: Merchant's Scale
notes: SRD adventuring gear. Balance, pans, and weights for appraising coin, gems, and trade goods.

name: Mess Kit
notes: SRD adventuring gear. Compact cookware and eating utensils for one traveler.

name: Miner's Pick
notes: SRD adventuring gear. Heavy pick for mining, excavation, and breaking packed earth or stone.

name: Mirror
notes: SRD adventuring gear. A handheld steel Mirror is useful for personal cosmetics but also for peeking around corners and reflecting light as a signal.

name: Mirror of Life Trapping
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare wondrous item. Can trap creatures in extradimensional cells inside the mirror.

name: Mysterious Deck
notes: SRD magic item. Legendary wondrous item. Deck of unpredictable powerful cards; SRD 5.2 renamed equivalent of the classic deck.

name: Necklace of Adaptation
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon wondrous item, requires attunement. Lets the wearer breathe normally in any environment and resist harmful gases.

name: Necklace of Prayer Beads
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wondrous item, requires attunement by a Cleric, Druid, or Paladin. Beads hold divine spell effects.

name: Needles (50)
notes: SRD ammunition. Amount: 50. Typical storage: Pouch.

name: Net
notes: SRD adventuring gear. When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your attacks with throwing a Net. Target a creature you can see within 15 feet of yourself.

name: Nolzur's Marvelous Pigments
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare wondrous item. Paint creates real objects from depicted surfaces within limits.

name: Orb
notes: SRD arcane focus. Used as a spellcasting focus when your class permits it.

name: Paper
notes: SRD adventuring gear. One sheet of Paper can hold about 250 handwritten words.

name: Parchment
notes: SRD adventuring gear. One sheet of Parchment can hold about 250 handwritten words.

name: Pearl of Power
notes: SRD Uncommon wondrous item, requires attunement by a spellcaster. Restores one expended spell slot up to 3rd level.

name: Perfume
notes: SRD adventuring gear. Perfume comes in a 4-ounce vial. For 1 hour after applying Perfume to yourself, you have Advantage on Charisma (Persuasion) checks made to influence an Indifferent Humanoid within 5 feet of yourself.

name: Periapt of Health
notes: SRD Uncommon wondrous item. Prevents disease while worn.

name: Periapt of Proof against Poison
notes: SRD Rare wondrous item. Grants immunity to poison damage and the Poisoned condition.

name: Periapt of Wound Closure
notes: SRD Uncommon wondrous item, requires attunement. Stabilizes the wearer and doubles Hit Dice healing.

name: Piton
notes: SRD adventuring gear. Spike used with rope for climbing, anchoring, or securing doors.

name: Pole
notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Pole is 10 feet long. You can use it to touch something up to 10 feet away.

name: Portable Hole
notes: SRD Rare wondrous item. Foldable extradimensional space; dangerous when combined with other extradimensional containers.

name: Pot, Iron
notes: SRD adventuring gear. An Iron Pot holds up to 1 gallon.

name: Pouch
notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Pouch holds up to 6 pounds within one-fifth of a cubic foot.

name: Priest's Pack
notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Priest's Pack contains the following items: Backpack, Blanket, Holy Water, Lamp, 7 days of Rations, Robe, and Tinderbox.

name: Quiver
notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Quiver holds up to 20 Arrows.

name: Quiver of Ehlonna
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon wondrous item. Extradimensional quiver that stores many arrows, bolts, bows, or similar objects.

name: Ram, Portable
notes: SRD adventuring gear. You can use a Portable Ram to break down doors. When doing so, you gain a +4 bonus to the Strength check.

name: Reliquary (held)
notes: SRD holy symbol. Used as a spellcasting focus when your class permits it.

name: Ring of Animal Influence
notes: SRD magic item. Rare ring. Holds charges for animal-themed enchantment effects.

name: Ring of Djinni Summoning
notes: SRD magic item. Legendary ring, requires attunement. Can summon a djinni bound to the ring.

name: Ring of Elemental Command
notes: SRD magic item. Legendary ring, requires attunement. Grants powers tied to air, earth, fire, or water elementals.

name: Ring of Evasion
notes: SRD magic item. Rare ring, requires attunement. Holds charges to turn failed Dexterity saves into successes.

name: Ring of Feather Falling
notes: SRD magic item. Rare ring, requires attunement. Grants Feather Fall when the wearer falls.

name: Ring of Free Action
notes: SRD magic item. Rare ring, requires attunement. Helps resist movement-restricting magic and difficult terrain.

name: Ring of Invisibility
notes: SRD magic item. Legendary ring, requires attunement. Lets the wearer become invisible until attacking, casting, or ending the effect.

name: Ring of Jumping
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon ring, requires attunement. Lets the wearer cast Jump on themself.

name: Ring of Mind Shielding
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon ring, requires attunement. Protects thoughts and alignment from magical reading.

name: Ring of Protection
notes: SRD magic item. Rare ring, requires attunement. Grants +1 bonus to Armor Class and saving throws.

name: Ring of Regeneration
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare ring, requires attunement. Restores hit points over time and can regrow lost body parts.

name: Ring of Resistance
notes: SRD magic item. Rare ring, requires attunement. Grants resistance to one damage type.

name: Ring of Shooting Stars
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare ring, requires attunement outdoors at night. Holds light and fire-based magical effects.

name: Ring of Spell Storing
notes: SRD magic item. Rare ring, requires attunement. Stores spells cast into it for later use by the wearer.

name: Ring of Spell Turning
notes: SRD magic item. Legendary ring, requires attunement. Helps resist and redirect single-target spells.

name: Ring of Swimming
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon ring. Grants a Swim Speed.

name: Ring of Telekinesis
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare ring, requires attunement. Lets the wearer cast Telekinesis on objects and creatures.

name: Ring of Three Wishes
notes: SRD magic item. Legendary ring. Holds limited Wish uses.

name: Ring of Warmth
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon ring, requires attunement. Grants resistance to cold damage and environmental cold protection.

name: Ring of Water Walking
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon ring. Lets the wearer move across liquid surfaces.

name: Ring of X-Ray Vision
notes: SRD magic item. Rare ring, requires attunement. Lets the wearer see through solid matter for short periods.

name: Robe
notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Robe has vocational or ceremonial significance. Some events and locations admit only people wearing a Robe bearing certain colors or symbols.

name: Robe of Eyes
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wondrous item, requires attunement. Grants enhanced sight, darkvision, and invisibility detection.

name: Robe of Powerlessness
notes: SRD magic item. Cursed wondrous item, requires attunement. Reduces Strength and Intelligence until the curse is removed.

name: Robe of Scintillating Colors
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare wondrous item, requires attunement. Creates dazzling light that can stun nearby creatures.

name: Robe of Stars
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare wondrous item, requires attunement. Stores magic stars and supports astral travel.

name: Robe of the Archmagi
notes: SRD magic item. Legendary wondrous item, requires attunement by a spellcaster. Improves spellcasting, AC, and spell saves.

name: Robe of Useful Items
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon wondrous item. Patches detach to become useful mundane objects.

name: Rod
notes: SRD arcane focus. Used as a spellcasting focus when your class permits it.

name: Rod of Absorption
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare rod, requires attunement. Absorbs spells and converts their energy into spell levels.

name: Rod of Alertness
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare rod, requires attunement. Improves perception and can create a defensive alertness aura.

name: Rod of Lordly Might
notes: SRD magic item. Legendary rod, requires attunement. Multifunction weapon and tool with several command-word forms.

name: Rod of Resurrection
notes: SRD magic item. Legendary rod, requires attunement by a Cleric, Druid, or Paladin. Holds charges for healing and resurrection magic.

name: Rod of Rulership
notes: SRD magic item. Rare rod, requires attunement. Can charm creatures in a wide area for a limited duration.

name: Rod of Security
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare rod. Creates an extradimensional paradise for rest and refuge.

name: Rope
notes: SRD adventuring gear. As a Utilize action, you can tie a knot with Rope if you succeed on a DC 10 Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check. The Rope can be burst with a successful DC 20 Strength (Athletics) check.

name: Rope of Climbing
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon wondrous item. Animated rope obeys simple commands and helps climbing.

name: Rope of Entanglement
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wondrous item. Animated rope can restrain a creature on command.

name: Sack
notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Sack holds up to 30 pounds within 1 cubic foot.

name: Saddle of the Cavalier
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon wondrous item. Makes a mounted rider harder to dismount and protects the mount.

name: Scarab of Protection
notes: SRD magic item. Legendary wondrous item, requires attunement. Protects against necrotic effects and undead magic.

name: Scholar's Pack
notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Scholar's Pack contains the following items: Backpack, Book, Ink, Ink Pen, Lamp, 10 flasks of Oil, 10 sheets of Parchment, and Tinderbox.

name: Sealing Wax
notes: SRD adventuring gear. Wax for sealed letters, containers, evidence, and official documents.

name: Sending Stones
notes: SRD Uncommon wondrous item. Paired stones enable the Sending spell between holders once per dawn.

name: Shovel
notes: SRD adventuring gear. Working for 1 hour, you can use a Shovel to dig a hole that is 5 feet on each side in soil or similar material.

name: Signal Whistle
notes: SRD adventuring gear. When blown as a Utilize action, a Signal Whistle produces a sound that can be heard up to 600 feet away.

name: Sledgehammer
notes: SRD adventuring gear. Two-handed hammer for demolition, wedges, and heavy labor.

name: Slippers of Spider Climbing
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon wondrous item, requires attunement. Lets the wearer move on vertical surfaces and ceilings.

name: Soap
notes: SRD adventuring gear. Basic hygiene item for cleaning hands, clothes, and travel gear.

name: Sovereign Glue
notes: SRD magic item. Legendary wondrous item. Permanently bonds two objects until dissolved by universal solvent or magic.

name: Spikes, Iron
notes: SRD adventuring gear. Iron Spikes come in bundles of ten. As a Utilize action, you can use a blunt object, such as a Light Hammer, to hammer a spike into wood, earth, or a similar material.

name: Sprig of mistletoe
notes: SRD druidic focus. Used as a spellcasting focus when your class permits it.

name: Spyglass
notes: SRD adventuring gear. Objects viewed through a Spyglass are magnified to twice their size.

name: Stabling per day
notes: SRD tack, harness, or drawn vehicle.

name: Staff (also a Quarterstaff)
notes: SRD arcane focus. Used as a spellcasting focus when your class permits it.

name: Stone of Controlling Earth Elementals
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wondrous item. Summons and helps command an earth elemental when touching the ground.

name: Stone of Good Luck
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon wondrous item, requires attunement. Grants +1 bonus to ability checks and saving throws.

name: Stone of Ill Luck
notes: SRD magic item. Cursed wondrous item, requires attunement. Looks beneficial but penalizes ability checks and saving throws.

name: String
notes: SRD adventuring gear. String is 10 feet long. You can tie a knot in it as a Utilize action.

name: Talisman of Pure Good
notes: SRD magic item. Legendary wondrous item, requires attunement by a good divine spellcaster. Can destroy evil creatures through charges.

name: Talisman of the Sphere
notes: SRD magic item. Legendary wondrous item, requires attunement. Helps control a Sphere of Annihilation.

name: Talisman of Ultimate Evil
notes: SRD magic item. Legendary wondrous item, requires attunement by an evil divine spellcaster. Can destroy good creatures through charges.

name: Tent
notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Tent sleeps up to two Small or Medium creatures.

name: Tinderbox
notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Tinderbox is a small container holding flint, fire steel, and tinder (usually dry cloth soaked in light oil) used to kindle a fire. Using it to light a Candle, Lamp, Lantern, or Torch—or anything else with exposed fuel—takes a Bonus Action.

name: Tome of Clear Thought
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare wondrous item. Reading and study increases Intelligence by 2 and its maximum by 2.

name: Tome of Leadership and Influence
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare wondrous item. Reading and study increases Charisma by 2 and its maximum by 2.

name: Tome of the Stilled Tongue
notes: SRD magic item. Legendary wondrous item, requires attunement by a Wizard. Spellbook that can cast prepared spells through its magic.

name: Tome of Understanding
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare wondrous item. Reading and study increases Wisdom by 2 and its maximum by 2.

name: Universal Solvent
notes: SRD magic item. Legendary wondrous item. Dissolves sovereign glue and other powerful adhesives.

name: Vial
notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Vial holds up to 4 ounces.

name: Wand
notes: SRD arcane focus. Used as a spellcasting focus when your class permits it.

name: Wand of Enemy Detection
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wand, requires attunement. Holds charges to sense hostile creatures nearby.

name: Wand of Fear
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wand, requires attunement. Holds charges for fear effects.

name: Wand of Fireballs
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wand, requires attunement by a spellcaster. Holds charges to cast Fireball.

name: Wand of Lightning Bolts
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wand, requires attunement by a spellcaster. Holds charges to cast Lightning Bolt.

name: Wand of Magic Detection
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon wand. Holds charges to cast Detect Magic.

name: Wand of Magic Missiles
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon wand. Holds charges to cast Magic Missile.

name: Wand of Paralysis
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wand, requires attunement by a spellcaster. Holds charges to paralyze a target.

name: Wand of Secrets
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon wand. Holds charges to detect secret doors and traps.

name: Wand of Web
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon wand, requires attunement by a spellcaster. Holds charges to cast Web.

name: Wand of Wonder
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wand, requires attunement by a spellcaster. Produces unpredictable magical effects.

name: Waterskin
notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Waterskin holds up to 4 pints. If you don't drink sufficient water, you risk dehydration (see "Rules Glossary").

name: Well of Many Worlds
notes: SRD magic item. Legendary wondrous item. Portable interplanar portal when opened and placed on a surface.

name: Whetstone
notes: SRD adventuring gear. Sharpening stone for blades, tools, and camp maintenance.

name: Wind Fan
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon wondrous item. Creates a gust of wind effect with a risk of breaking from repeated use.

name: Winged Boots
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon wondrous item, requires attunement. Grants a Fly Speed for limited daily duration.

name: Wings of Flying
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wondrous item, requires attunement. Cloak transforms into wings and grants flying for a limited time.

name: Wooden staff (also a Quarterstaff)
notes: SRD druidic focus. Used as a spellcasting focus when your class permits it.

name: Yew wand
notes: SRD druidic focus. Used as a spellcasting focus when your class permits it.

name: Adamantine Armor
notes: SRD Uncommon magic armor. Critical hits against the wearer become normal hits.

name: Animated Shield
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare magic shield, requires attunement. Floats to protect the wielder while leaving their hand free.

name: Armor +1
notes: SRD Rare magic armor template. Grants +1 bonus to Armor Class while worn.

name: Armor +2
notes: SRD Very rare magic armor template. Grants +2 bonus to Armor Class while worn.

name: Armor +3
notes: SRD Legendary magic armor template. Grants +3 bonus to Armor Class while worn.

name: Armor of Resistance
notes: SRD magic item. Rare magic armor, requires attunement. Grants resistance to one damage type while worn.

name: Armor of Vulnerability
notes: SRD magic item. Rare magic armor, requires attunement. Grants resistance to one damage type but vulnerability to others through its curse.

name: Breastplate
notes: SRD armor. Armor Class: 14 + Dex modifier (max 2). Strength: —. Stealth: —.

name: Chain Mail
notes: SRD armor. Armor Class: 16. Strength: Str 13. Stealth: Disadvantage.

name: Chain Shirt
notes: SRD armor. Armor Class: 13 + Dex modifier (max 2). Strength: —. Stealth: —.

name: Demon Armor
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare magic armor, requires attunement. Plate armor with clawed gauntlets and a demonic curse.

name: Elven Chain
notes: SRD magic item. Rare magic chain shirt. Grants a bonus to AC and can be worn even without armor proficiency.

name: Glamoured Studded Leather
notes: SRD magic item. Rare magic armor. +1 studded leather that can change appearance by command word.

name: Half Plate Armor
notes: SRD armor. Armor Class: 15 + Dex modifier (max 2). Strength: —. Stealth: Disadvantage.

name: Hide Armor
notes: SRD armor. Armor Class: 12 + Dex modifier (max 2). Strength: —. Stealth: —.

name: Leather Armor
notes: SRD armor. Armor Class: 11 + Dex modifier. Strength: —. Stealth: —.

name: Mariner's Armor
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon magic armor. Grants a swim speed and floats the wearer upward if they drop to 0 HP underwater.

name: Mithral Armor
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon magic armor. Removes Strength and Stealth drawbacks normally associated with some metal armors.

name: Padded Armor
notes: SRD armor. Armor Class: 11 + Dex modifier. Strength: —. Stealth: Disadvantage.

name: Plate Armor
notes: SRD armor. Armor Class: 18. Strength: Str 15. Stealth: Disadvantage.

name: Plate Armor of Etherealness
notes: SRD Legendary magic armor, requires attunement. Can grant the effect of Etherealness once per dawn.

name: Ring Mail
notes: SRD armor. Armor Class: 14. Strength: —. Stealth: Disadvantage.

name: Scale Mail
notes: SRD armor. Armor Class: 14 + Dex modifier (max 2). Strength: —. Stealth: Disadvantage.

name: Sentinel Shield
notes: SRD Uncommon magic shield. Grants advantage on initiative rolls and Wisdom (Perception) checks while held.

name: Shield
notes: SRD armor. Armor Class: +2. Strength: —. Stealth: —.

name: Shield +1
notes: SRD Uncommon magic shield. Grants +1 bonus to Armor Class in addition to the shield bonus.

name: Shield +2
notes: SRD Rare magic shield. Grants +2 bonus to Armor Class in addition to the shield bonus.

name: Shield +3
notes: SRD Very rare magic shield. Grants +3 bonus to Armor Class in addition to the shield bonus.

name: Shield of Missile Attraction
notes: SRD magic item. Rare magic shield, requires attunement. Grants resistance to ranged weapon damage but attracts nearby ranged attacks.

name: Shield of the Cavalier
notes: SRD Rare magic shield, requires attunement. Protects mounted or adjacent allies with defensive magic.

name: Splint Armor
notes: SRD armor. Armor Class: 17. Strength: Str 15. Stealth: Disadvantage.

name: Studded Leather Armor
notes: SRD armor. Armor Class: 12 + Dex modifier. Strength: —. Stealth: —.

name: Acid
notes: SRD adventuring gear. When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your attacks with throwing a vial of Acid. Target one creature or object you can see within 20 feet of yourself.

name: Alchemist's Fire
notes: SRD adventuring gear. When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your attacks with throwing a flask of Alchemist's Fire. Target one creature or object you can see within 20 feet of yourself.

name: Antitoxin
notes: SRD adventuring gear. As a Bonus Action, you can drink a vial of Antitoxin to gain Advantage on saving throws to avoid or end the Poisoned condition for 1 hour.

name: Bead of Force
notes: SRD Rare wondrous item. Thrown bead bursts for force damage and can trap creatures in a resilient sphere.

name: Bead of Nourishment
notes: SRD Common wondrous item. Consuming the bead provides nourishment equal to one day of rations.

name: Candle
notes: SRD adventuring gear. For 1 hour, a lit Candle sheds Bright Light in a 5-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 5 feet.

name: Driftseed
notes: SRD magic item. Common wondrous item. A tiny seed-like item that drifts and floats, useful for harmless magical flavor or signaling.

name: Dust of Disappearance
notes: SRD Uncommon wondrous item. A pinch turns creatures and objects invisible for a short duration.

name: Dust of Dryness
notes: SRD Uncommon wondrous item. Absorbs water into a pellet that can later release it.

name: Dust of Sneezing and Choking
notes: SRD Uncommon wondrous item. Creates a choking cloud that can incapacitate breathing creatures.

name: Elemental Gem
notes: SRD Uncommon wondrous item. Breaking the gem summons an elemental linked to the gem type.

name: Elixir of Health
notes: SRD magic item. Rare potion. Ends blinded, deafened, paralyzed, and poisoned conditions, plus nonmagical diseases.

name: Flask
notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Flask holds up to 1 pint.

name: Holy Water
notes: SRD adventuring gear. When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your attacks with throwing a flask of Holy Water. Target one creature you can see within 20 feet of yourself.

name: Keoghtom's Ointment
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon wondrous item. A dose heals hit points and cures poison and disease.

name: Necklace of Fireballs
notes: SRD Rare wondrous item. Detaching and throwing a bead creates a Fireball effect; track remaining beads as quantity.

name: Oil
notes: SRD adventuring gear. You can douse a creature, object, or space with Oil or use it as fuel, as detailed below. Dousing a Creature or an Object.

name: Oil of Etherealness
notes: SRD magic item. Rare oil. Coats one Medium or smaller creature and grants the effect of Etherealness for 1 hour.

name: Oil of Sharpness
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare oil. Coats one slashing or piercing weapon or up to 5 pieces of ammunition, granting +3 attack and damage bonus for 1 hour.

name: Oil of Slipperiness
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon oil. Coats a creature for the Freedom of Movement effect or creates an extremely slippery surface.

name: Oil of Taggit
notes: SRD consumable. Poison. A creature subjected to the oil risks falling unconscious.

name: Poison, Basic
notes: SRD adventuring gear. As a Bonus Action, you can use a vial of Basic Poison to coat one weapon or up to three pieces of ammunition. A creature that takes Piercing or Slashing damage from the poisoned weapon or ammunition takes an extra 1d4 Poison damage.

name: Potion of Animal Friendship
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon potion. Drinking it lets the user cast the level 3 version of Animal Friendship with save DC 13.

name: Potion of Clairvoyance
notes: SRD magic item. Rare potion. Drinking it grants the effect of Clairvoyance without requiring concentration.

name: Potion of Climbing
notes: SRD magic item. Common potion. Grants a Climb Speed equal to Speed for 1 hour and advantage on Strength (Athletics) checks to climb.

name: Potion of Delusion
notes: SRD magic item. Cursed potion. The drinker believes the potion had its intended effect even when it did not.

name: Potion of Diminution
notes: SRD magic item. Rare potion. Drinking it grants the reduce effect of Enlarge/Reduce for 1d4 hours without concentration.

name: Potion of Fire Breath
notes: SRD consumable. Uncommon potion. Lets the drinker exhale fire as a Bonus Action for a short duration.

name: Potion of Flying
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare potion. Grants a Fly Speed equal to Speed for 1 hour and lets the user hover.

name: Potion of Gaseous Form
notes: SRD magic item. Rare potion. Grants the effect of Gaseous Form for 1 hour without concentration, ending early by Bonus Action.

name: Potion of Giant Strength (Cloud)
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare potion. Sets Strength to 27 for 1 hour unless the user already has equal or greater Strength.

name: Potion of Giant Strength (Fire)
notes: SRD magic item. Rare potion. Sets Strength to 25 for 1 hour unless the user already has equal or greater Strength.

name: Potion of Giant Strength (Frost or Stone)
notes: SRD magic item. Rare potion. Sets Strength to 23 for 1 hour unless the user already has equal or greater Strength.

name: Potion of Giant Strength (Hill)
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon potion. Sets Strength to 21 for 1 hour unless the user already has equal or greater Strength.

name: Potion of Giant Strength (Storm)
notes: SRD magic item. Legendary potion. Sets Strength to 29 for 1 hour unless the user already has equal or greater Strength.

name: Potion of Growth
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon potion. Grants the enlarge effect of Enlarge/Reduce for 1d4 hours without concentration.

name: Potion of Healing
notes: SRD adventuring gear. Drink or administer it to restore 2d4 + 2 hit points.

name: Potion of Healing (Greater)
notes: Magic potion. Drink or administer it to restore 4d4 + 4 hit points.

name: Potion of Healing (Superior)
notes: SRD consumable. Rare potion. Drinking or administering it restores 8d4 + 8 Hit Points.

name: Potion of Healing (Supreme)
notes: SRD consumable. Very rare potion. Drinking or administering it restores 10d4 + 20 Hit Points.

name: Potion of Heroism
notes: SRD magic item. Rare potion. Grants 10 temporary hit points and the effect of Bless for 1 hour without concentration.

name: Potion of Invisibility
notes: SRD consumable. Very rare potion. Grants the effect of Invisibility until the drinker attacks or casts a spell.

name: Potion of Invulnerability
notes: SRD magic item. Rare potion. Grants resistance to all damage for 1 minute.

name: Potion of Longevity
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare potion. Reduces physical age by 1d6 + 6 years, with increasing risk after repeated use.

name: Potion of Maximum Power
notes: SRD consumable. Rare potion. Maximizes one damaging spell of 4th level or lower cast before the potion effect ends.

name: Potion of Mind Control (Beast)
notes: SRD consumable. Rare potion. Lets the drinker influence a beast for a limited duration.

name: Potion of Mind Control (Humanoid)
notes: SRD consumable. Rare potion. Lets the drinker influence a humanoid for a limited duration.

name: Potion of Mind Control (Monster)
notes: SRD consumable. Very rare potion. Lets the drinker influence a monster for a limited duration.

name: Potion of Mind Reading
notes: SRD magic item. Rare potion. Grants the effect of Detect Thoughts with save DC 13.

name: Potion of Poison
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon potion. Appears beneficial but poisons the drinker; useful as loot, trap, or deception inventory.

name: Potion of Possibility
notes: SRD consumable. Very rare potion. Grants fragments of possibility that can modify nearby d20 rolls.

name: Potion of Resistance
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon potion. Grants resistance to one damage type for 1 hour.

name: Potion of Speed
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare potion. Grants the effect of Haste for 1 minute without concentration.

name: Potion of Vitality
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare potion. Removes exhaustion and disease/poison effects, and maximizes Hit Dice healing for 24 hours.

name: Potion of Watchful Rest
notes: SRD consumable. Common potion. Keeps the drinker aware during a long rest while still gaining rest benefits.

name: Potion of Water Breathing
notes: SRD magic item. Uncommon potion. Grants the ability to breathe underwater for 1 hour.

name: Rations
notes: SRD adventuring gear. Rations consist of travel-ready food, including jerky, dried fruit, hardtack, and nuts. See "Malnutrition" in "Rules Glossary" for the risks of not eating.

name: Scroll of Protection
notes: SRD magic scroll, rare. Creates a temporary protective barrier against a creature type chosen by the scroll.

name: Serpent Venom
notes: SRD consumable. Poison. Injury poison harvested from serpents and used to add poison damage to weapons.

name: Spell Scroll (Cantrip)
notes: SRD adventuring gear.

name: Spell Scroll (Level 1)
notes: SRD adventuring gear.

name: Spell Scroll (Level 2)
notes: SRD magic scroll. Contains one spell of level 2; using it should consume the scroll and follow spellcasting rules for scrolls.

name: Spell Scroll (Level 3)

name: Spell Scroll (Level 8)

name: Spell Scroll (Level 9)
notes: SRD magic scroll. Contains one spell of level 9; using it should consume the scroll and follow spellcasting rules for scrolls.

name: Torpor
notes: SRD consumable. Poison. Ingested poison that can incapacitate a creature for hours.

name: Truth Serum
notes: SRD consumable. Poison. Ingested serum that impairs deception and compels truthful answers.

name: Wyvern Poison
notes: SRD consumable. Poison. Potent injury poison that deals heavy poison damage on a failed save.

notes: SRD tool. Ability: Dexterity. Utilize: Write text with impressive flourishes that guard against forgery (DC 15). Craft: Ink, _Spell Scroll_.

notes: SRD tool. Ability: Wisdom. Utilize: Draft a map of a small area (DC 15). Craft: Map.

notes: SRD tool. Ability: Intelligence. Utilize: Identify a plant (DC 10). Craft: Antitoxin, Candle, Healer's Kit, _Potion of Healing_.

name: Horn
notes: SRD musical instrument. Proficiency applies to checks made with this instrument.

name: Horn of Blasting
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wondrous item. Emits a thunderous blast that can damage creatures and objects.

name: Horn of Valhalla (Brass)
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wondrous item. Summons warrior spirits for a battle.

name: Horn of Valhalla (Bronze)
notes: SRD magic item. Very rare wondrous item. Summons warrior spirits for a battle.

name: Horn of Valhalla (Iron)
notes: SRD magic item. Legendary wondrous item. Summons warrior spirits for a battle.

name: Horn of Valhalla (Silver)
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wondrous item. Summons warrior spirits for a battle.

name: Instrument of the Bards (Canaith Mandolin)
notes: SRD magic item. Rare wondrous item, requires attunement by a Bard. Magical instrument with stored spells and charm protection.
